criteria: Gate 1: Scope & Authorization - Confirm lawful basis, no prohibited methods, and explicitly state scope.
Gate 2: Disambiguation - Identify all plausible candidates and use a primary source discriminator before reporting.
Gate 3: Source Independence - Trace each claim to an independent primary source. Self-published claims are not independent.
Gate 4: Confidence Grading - Every finding must have a letter grade (A, B, C, D) based on the rubric.
Output Contract - Must produce a markdown dossier and a findings.json sidecar (unless it is a Quick investigation).
